ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-tools
Language: c%23
Tools repository leveraged by the Azure SDK team.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cysharp/UniTask
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cysharp/UniTask
Language: c%23
Provides an efficient allocation free async/await integration for Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MiniMax-AI/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-sdk-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-net
Language: c%23
The official AWS SDK for .NET. For more information on the AWS SDK for .NET, see our web site:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed0ard/CS2-Bot-Improver
Language: c%23
CS2-Bot-Improver is a plugin for Counter-Strike 2 that improves bots' aim, movement, nade throwing, personalities, strategies, etc. Aims to enhance your experience when playing against bots offline or with friends. It can be installed on both clients and servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23
The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lepoco/wpfui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lepoco/wpfui
Language: c%23
WPF UI provides the Fluent experience in your known and loved WPF framework. Intuitive design, themes, navigation and new immersive controls. All natively and effortlessly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memstechtips/Winhance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memstechtips/Winhance
Language: c%23
Application designed to optimize, customize and enhance your Windows experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
Language: c%23
The official C# SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.
